subject: WM-0062 review: changes_requested
body: High: M4LampGapIndex can miss a dirty lamp when its derived dirty queue is full, then refreshDirty advances sourceVersion to the store version and queryActiveGaps returns stale candidates as current. High: room/group scoped gap queries use one global score list and apply candidateCap before reaching scoped lamps, so valid scoped candidates can be omitted. Medium: selectedCapHit under-reports when the selected cap fills but the list ends before candidateCap.
